title: isodon rivularis
intro: Isodon rivularis, also known as the Chinese dwarf isodon or isodon, is a perennial plant species in the mint family. The medicinal properties of Isodon rivularis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which have been utilized in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Isodon rivularis typically involve steeping the dried leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
